'''Carnovian eel''' were creatures growing in the great depths of the [[Carnovia]]n [[Ocean/Legends|seas]]. These gigantic eels were eaten by [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] as a delicacy, and were raised in pens by Hutt [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Creature-stub}}
